top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Decline, Oil Gains as US Hits Iran: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks dropped as a selloff in technology shares resumed and tensions in the Middle East escalated after US forces struck Iran. Crude oil advanced.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Alberta to Propose ‘General Corridor’ for Pipeline to West Coast
top_signals.summary: Alberta is set to propose a “general corridor” for a planned new million-barrel-a-day oil pipeline to the northern British Columbia coast rather than a specific route, the provincial minister of Indigenous relations said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US passes DOMINANCE Act for critical minerals security
top_signals.summary: Bipartisan legislation introduced to strengthen US energy security.
